checklist_item_templates.title: Develop workforce training plan
checklist_item_templates.description: Assess current skills, identify gaps, and design a training program to support your expansion.

checklist_item_templates.title: Create hiring and onboarding strategy
checklist_item_templates.description: Define roles, timelines, and onboarding processes for new hires needed for expansion.

checklist_item_templates.title: Explore expansion financing options
checklist_item_templates.description: Review bank loans, public incentives, and private financing to fund your expansion.

checklist_item_templates.title: Build 24-month cash flow projection
checklist_item_templates.description: Model cash inflows and outflows under expansion scenarios to ensure adequate liquidity.

checklist_item_templates.title: Update marketing and sales plan
checklist_item_templates.description: Align your marketing and sales strategy with new capacity and target markets.

checklist_item_templates.title: Assess export readiness
checklist_item_templates.description: Evaluate your products, operations, and compliance for international markets.

checklist_item_templates.title: Develop basic exporting plan
checklist_item_templates.description: Identify priority export markets, logistics partners, and pricing strategies.

checklist_item_templates.title: Define facility and space requirements
checklist_item_templates.description: Determine square footage, layout, and infrastructure needs for the expanded operation.

checklist_item_templates.title: Shortlist potential sites and buildings
checklist_item_templates.description: Use the regional site selector to identify candidate properties that meet your criteria.

checklist_item_templates.title: Map and optimize key operational processes
checklist_item_templates.description: Document current processes, identify bottlenecks, and design improvements for scale.

checklist_item_templates.title: Review regulatory and permitting requirements
checklist_item_templates.description: Confirm zoning, environmental, and licensing requirements for your expansion.

checklist_item_templates.title: Identify eligible grants and incentives
checklist_item_templates.description: Compile a list of relevant grants, tax credits, and rebates to support expansion.

checklist_item_templates.title: Set expansion milestones and KPIs
checklist_item_templates.description: Define clear milestones and performance indicators to track expansion progress.

checklist_item_templates.title: Create risk and contingency plan
checklist_item_templates.description: Identify key risks and define contingency actions for supply, workforce, and financing.

grant_programs.name: Advanced Manufacturing Startup Innovation Grant
grant_programs.short_description: Seed funding for early-stage manufacturing startups investing in new production capacity.
grant_programs.full_description: The Advanced Manufacturing Startup Innovation Grant supports capital investment, equipment purchases, and process innovation for small manufacturing firms. Eligible uses include prototyping, production line upgrades, and facility build-out tied to job creation.

grant_programs.name: Small Manufacturer Modernization Fund
grant_programs.short_description: Matching grants to help small manufacturers modernize equipment and systems.
grant_programs.full_description: The Small Manufacturer Modernization Fund provides matching grants to support equipment upgrades, automation, and digitalization projects. Priority is given to projects that improve productivity and create or retain quality jobs.

grant_programs.name: Regional Manufacturing Micro-Grant
grant_programs.short_description: Micro-grants for small-scale equipment and process improvements.
grant_programs.full_description: The Regional Manufacturing Micro-Grant program offers small awards to support targeted equipment purchases, safety improvements, and lean implementation projects for micro manufacturers.

grant_programs.name: Technology Innovation Seed Grant
grant_programs.short_description: Grants for early-stage technology companies developing new products.
grant_programs.full_description: Supports prototype development, market validation, and commercialization planning for regional technology startups.

grant_programs.name: Export Market Entry Grant
grant_programs.short_description: Cost-share grants for companies entering new international markets.
grant_programs.full_description: Helps offset costs for trade shows, export consulting, market research, and compliance for first-time exporters.

grant_programs.name: Rural Business Growth Grant
grant_programs.short_description: Support for rural businesses expanding operations or workforce.
grant_programs.full_description: Provides grants for capital projects, workforce development, and market diversification for rural-based businesses.

grant_programs.name: Green Construction Innovation Grant
grant_programs.short_description: Funding for sustainable construction methods and materials.
grant_programs.full_description: Encourages the adoption of green building standards and innovative materials in commercial and residential construction projects.

grant_programs.name: Healthcare Technology Pilot Grant
grant_programs.short_description: Support for healthcare providers piloting new technologies.
grant_programs.full_description: Funds pilot projects that implement innovative healthcare technologies aimed at improving patient outcomes and operational efficiency.

grant_programs.name: Logistics Efficiency Improvement Grant
grant_programs.short_description: Grants to improve logistics infrastructure and systems.
grant_programs.full_description: Supports investments in warehouse automation, transportation management systems, and last-mile delivery innovations.

grant_programs.name: Services Sector Digital Upgrade Grant
grant_programs.short_description: Small grants to help service firms digitize operations.
grant_programs.full_description: Supports implementation of CRM, ERP, and other digital tools that improve efficiency and customer experience for service-oriented businesses.

incentive_programs.name: High Impact Job Creation Tax Credit
incentive_programs.short_description: A refundable tax credit for businesses that create significant numbers of new jobs in the region.
incentive_programs.full_description: The High Impact Job Creation Tax Credit provides a refundable income tax credit based on new payroll and job creation benchmarks. Eligible projects must create at least 20 new full-time positions within three years and meet wage thresholds.
incentive_programs.eligibility_summary: Available to expanding businesses creating 20 or more new full-time jobs with wages at or above the county average.
incentive_programs.application_process: Submit an online pre-application outlining the project, followed by a full application and board approval.

incentive_programs.name: Small Business Expansion Tax Credit
incentive_programs.short_description: Tax credit for small businesses investing in facility or equipment expansion.
incentive_programs.full_description: The Small Business Expansion Tax Credit is targeted to firms with fewer than 100 employees that are investing in new equipment, facility expansion, or modernization that leads to job growth.
incentive_programs.eligibility_summary: Businesses with fewer than 100 employees making at least $250,000 in qualified capital investment.
incentive_programs.application_process: File an application with project budget, timelines, and job impact analysis prior to project start.

incentive_programs.name: Research & Development Tax Credit
incentive_programs.short_description: Tax credit based on qualified R&D expenditures.
incentive_programs.full_description: Provides an income tax credit equal to a percentage of qualified research and development expenses incurred within the region.
incentive_programs.eligibility_summary: Available to companies increasing R&D spending year-over-year in eligible activities.
incentive_programs.application_process: Claim via state corporate tax return with supporting documentation and optional pre-certification.

incentive_programs.name: Logistics Hub Property Tax Abatement
incentive_programs.short_description: Property tax abatement for logistics and distribution centers.
incentive_programs.full_description: Offers a multi-year property tax abatement on real and personal property associated with eligible logistics projects.
incentive_programs.eligibility_summary: Available to large-scale distribution centers making significant capital investments and creating at least 50 new jobs.
incentive_programs.application_process: Work with the local municipality to secure a tax abatement resolution and file necessary documentation.

incentive_programs.name: Customized Workforce Training Grant
incentive_programs.short_description: Reimbursable grant for training new and existing employees.
incentive_programs.full_description: Provides partial reimbursement for the cost of customized training programs delivered in partnership with local community colleges or approved providers.
incentive_programs.eligibility_summary: Employers committing to new job creation or significant upskilling of current employees.
incentive_programs.application_process: Submit training plan, budget, and provider information via the online portal.

incentive_programs.name: Green Building Retrofit Rebate
incentive_programs.full_description: Businesses that complete qualifying energy-efficient retrofits can receive a rebate based on verified energy savings.
incentive_programs.eligibility_summary: Open to commercial and industrial building owners meeting program criteria.
incentive_programs.application_process: Pre-approval required; rebate paid after project completion and verification.

incentive_programs.name: Export Working Capital Loan
incentive_programs.short_description: Low-interest loans to support export-related working capital needs.
incentive_programs.full_description: Provides working capital financing to support purchase orders, inventory, and receivables tied to international sales.
incentive_programs.eligibility_summary: Export-ready firms with confirmed or projected international orders.
incentive_programs.application_process: Apply through participating lenders with support from the regional export assistance center.

incentive_programs.name: Legacy Manufacturing Tax Credit
incentive_programs.short_description: Legacy credit for long-standing manufacturers (program closed).
incentive_programs.full_description: This legacy program provided income tax credits for capital investment by manufacturers. It has been replaced by newer incentives.
incentive_programs.application_process: Program expired; information provided for reference only.

incentive_programs.name: Microenterprise Launch Grant
incentive_programs.full_description: Provides modest grants to help very small businesses cover startup costs such as licensing, equipment, or initial inventory.
incentive_programs.eligibility_summary: Businesses with 5 or fewer employees located in eligible census tracts.
incentive_programs.application_process: Submit a simple business plan and proof of training from an approved provider.

incentive_programs.name: Agri-Business Expansion Loan
incentive_programs.short_description: Low-interest loans for expanding agri-business operations.
incentive_programs.full_description: Supports land acquisition, equipment purchases, and facility expansion for regional agri-businesses.
incentive_programs.eligibility_summary: Available to established agri-businesses with strong financials and growth plans.
incentive_programs.application_process: Apply through partner lenders with a detailed expansion plan and financial projections.

metric_definitions.name: Unemployment Rate
metric_definitions.description: Percentage of the labor force that is unemployed and actively seeking work.

metric_definitions.name: Average Hourly Wage
metric_definitions.description: Average hourly wages for employees in the selected industry and region.

metric_definitions.name: Labor Force Participation Rate
metric_definitions.description: Share of the working-age population that is either employed or actively seeking work.

metric_definitions.name: Median Annual Wage
metric_definitions.description: Median annual earnings for full-time workers in the selected industry.

metric_definitions.name: Employment Growth Index
metric_definitions.description: Index measuring change in total employment over time.

organizations.name: Riverbend Women's Business Center
organizations.short_description: Advising, training, and capital access for women-owned businesses.
organizations.full_description: The Riverbend Women's Business Center provides one-on-one advising, classroom training, and connections to lenders for women-owned and women-led enterprises across all industries.

organizations.name: Hawthorne Women Entrepreneurs Network
organizations.short_description: Peer network and mentoring for women starting and growing companies.
organizations.full_description: A regional peer network offering mentoring circles, pitch practice, and topic-specific workshops for women entrepreneurs at all stages.

organizations.name: Women in Manufacturing - Riverbend Chapter
organizations.short_description: Industry group supporting women leaders in manufacturing.
organizations.full_description: The Riverbend chapter of Women in Manufacturing connects women working in production, engineering, and plant leadership roles through events, plant tours, and leadership training.

organizations.name: Riverbend Export Assistance Center
organizations.short_description: Technical assistance and training for regional exporters.
organizations.full_description: Provides export counseling, market research, and compliance training to help companies enter and grow in international markets.

organizations.name: Minority Business Alliance of Riverbend
organizations.short_description: Advocacy and support for minority-owned businesses.
organizations.full_description: The Minority Business Alliance promotes inclusive economic growth by providing training, advocacy, and access to capital for minority-owned firms.

organizations.name: Riverbend Startup Incubator
organizations.full_description: Provides co-working space, mentorship, and access to investors for scalable startups in technology, advanced manufacturing, and services.

organizations.name: Riverbend Manufacturing Council
organizations.full_description: A membership-based organization providing advocacy, networking, and shared training for manufacturers of all sizes.

organizations.name: Hawthorne Rural Business Center
organizations.full_description: Offers on-site advising, capital access, and training tailored to rural businesses in Hawthorne County.

organizations.name: Riverbend Small Business Development Center
organizations.short_description: No-cost advising for small businesses in the region.
organizations.full_description: Part of the statewide SBDC network, providing confidential one-on-one advising, training, and market research to small businesses.

organizations.name: Riverbend Technology Council
organizations.short_description: Industry association for regional tech firms.
organizations.full_description: Hosts meetups, policy forums, and talent initiatives to support the region's technology sector.

organizations.name: Women Exporters Circle
organizations.short_description: Peer learning group for women-owned firms entering global markets.
organizations.full_description: A cohort-based program that helps women-owned businesses build export strategies through group coaching and expert-led sessions.

organizations.name: Entrepreneur Legal Clinic
organizations.short_description: Pro-bono legal support for small businesses and startups.
organizations.full_description: Provides limited-scope legal assistance on entity formation, contracts, and IP issues to eligible entrepreneurs.

events.title: Exporting 101: Getting Started with International Sales
events.short_description: Beginner-friendly workshop on the basics of exporting for small businesses.
events.full_description: This in-person workshop introduces small business owners to the fundamentals of exporting, including how to assess export readiness, identify target markets, and understand basic logistics and documentation. Participants will leave with a simple checklist of first steps and information on regional export assistance resources.

events.title: Intro to Exporting for Service Firms (Online)
events.short_description: Online beginner workshop on exporting services and digital products.
events.full_description: Designed for service-based businesses and digital product companies, this webinar covers how to scope international opportunities, manage cross-border payments, and navigate basic regulatory considerations for exporting services.

events.title: International Trade Compliance Essentials
events.short_description: Understand key compliance requirements when exporting goods.
events.full_description: This session provides an overview of export controls, sanctions, and documentation requirements. Ideal for companies that have begun exporting and want to strengthen their compliance practices.

events.title: Advanced Export Strategy Lab
events.short_description: Hands-on lab for companies scaling international operations.
events.full_description: A deep-dive working session focused on pricing, channel strategy, and structuring international partnerships. Recommended for firms with at least one year of export experience.

events.title: Funding Programs for New Exporters
events.short_description: Overview of grants and loans that support export market entry.
events.full_description: This past webinar walked through regional and federal funding tools for companies entering export markets, including grant and loan programs.

events.title: Practical Automation for Small Manufacturers
events.short_description: Hands-on session exploring affordable automation options.
events.full_description: Small and mid-sized manufacturers will explore case studies and vendor demos to understand how to adopt automation solutions that fit their budget and workforce.

events.title: Manufacturing Leaders Peer Roundtable
events.short_description: Facilitated discussion for plant and operations leaders.
events.full_description: A peer-to-peer forum where manufacturing leaders discuss operational challenges, workforce issues, and growth strategies in a confidential setting.

events.title: Building Your Talent Pipeline
events.short_description: Strategies for recruiting and retaining skilled workers.
events.full_description: Learn how to partner with local schools, training providers, and workforce agencies to build a sustainable pipeline of talent for your growing business.

events.title: Launching Apprenticeship Programs
events.short_description: How to design and register apprenticeship programs.
events.full_description: This workshop walks employers through the steps to design, register, and implement apprenticeship programs that address critical skill shortages.

events.title: Cybersecurity Basics for Small Manufacturers & Tech Firms
events.short_description: Protect your business from common cyber threats.
events.full_description: An applied session covering practical steps small manufacturers and technology firms can take to secure their systems, safeguard customer data, and respond to cyber incidents.

events.title: Access to Capital for Growing Businesses
events.short_description: Panel discussion with lenders and capital providers.
events.full_description: Hear from banks, CDFIs, and investors about what they look for in growing businesses and how to prepare for financing conversations.

events.title: Business Plan Bootcamp
events.short_description: Beginner session to build or refine your business plan.
events.full_description: A fast-paced bootcamp that walks entrepreneurs through the key components of an effective business plan, including market analysis, operations, and financial projections.
